overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk industrial city at dusk. The camera moves steadily forward along an elevated metal walkway, passing large mechanical structures and overlooking a neon-lit urban canyon with towering buildings and overhead industrial bridges.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway in cyberpunk city district

events.description: large mechanical armature on left passes out of frame as camera moves forward

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the elevated metal catwalk, passing the large industrial machinery on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a rain-slicked elevated metal catwalk in a dense cyberpunk industrial zone. A massive mechanical armature dominates the left foreground while overhead industrial bridges span the canyon between towering buildings. Red neon signs glow in the distant right as heavy rain falls through the dusk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon with steam vents and neon-lit lower levels

events.description: steam emissions become visible rising from the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway deeper into the industrial city canyon, approaching the distant tower

entered.detail: white steam or smoke emissions rising from industrial vents on the right side
detailed industrial building facades with balconies and metal structures on the right

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large mechanical structure, the view opens to reveal more of the industrial city canyon. The camera continues along the elevated walkway with steam vents now visible on the right side. The overhead bridge structure appears closer while the distant central tower remains the focal point ahead, surrounded by the glow of various neon lights from the street level below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along an elevated industrial walkway that transitions from a confined mechanical corridor into a wide vista of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins by passing a massive mechanical armature on the left, moving through heavy rain and dusk light beneath a network of overhead industrial bridges. As the camera clears the large structure, the view opens to reveal the depth of the city canyon, with steam vents appearing on the right side of the rain-slicked catwalk. The scene then expands toward a distant central tower, shifting the focus from the immediate industrial machinery to the glowing neon lights of the street level below.
